sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73043" key="o)ligomuqi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-μῡθία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speaking little,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:274" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">274</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
